common.noFactory: No factory selected. Pick the current factory in the top bar.

page.categoriesSub: Multi-level category tree · names in 9 languages
page.seriesSub: Series name / intro in 9 languages · cover image
page.rulesSub: Cross-category compatibility engine · auto suggest / link accessories

dashboard.noScans: No scans in the last 30 days

category.empty: No categories yet. Click “+ Top category”, then use 📁 on a row to add subcategories.
category.selectHint: Select a category on the left to edit it here
category.selectSub: Category names support 9 languages + AI translation; set image and parent
category.draftOk: Created — fill in the name on the right and save

series.empty: No series yet. Click “+ New series” to create one.
series.selectHint: Select a series on the left to edit it here
series.selectSub: Series name / intro support 9 languages + AI translation; set cover and category
series.draftOk: Created — fill in the name on the right and save
series.introPh: Series intro, shown atop the public “Discover the … series” page…

rule.count: {n} rules. Rules define which product type fits which, auto-suggesting accessories across categories.
rule.empty: No rules yet. Click “New rule”, e.g. main “Strip” → accessory “Channel”, condition pcbWidth equal.
rule.name: Rule name
rule.conditions: Match conditions (all must pass · empty = same category fits)
rule.noCond: No conditions: products in the main category will suggest all products in the accessory category.
rule.bidir: Bidirectional (also suggest the main on the accessory page)
rule.autoLinkOpt: Auto-link (otherwise only suggest on the product page)
rule.needTwoCats: Rules need at least two categories (main + accessory). Create your category tree first.

prod.name: Product name
prod.galleryEmpty: No gallery images yet. Upload 3–6: main shot, close-ups, install, scene.
prod.certPh: Type and press Enter, e.g. CE / RoHS / IP65
prod.deleteSub: Also removes this product's images / documents / videos / links / stats. Irreversible.

show.sub: Selling points · highlights · applications · long detail · FAQ
show.auditNote: Reviewing a translation — name & spec translations are AI-maintained here; variant label / luminaire type / dimension values are source-only, edited under “source”.
show.aiGenHint: From luminaire type + specs, generate selling points / highlights / scenes / FAQ / box contents / install / long detail. Draft only, review before saving.
show.aiTransTitle: Multilingual: fill one, AI completes the other 8
show.aiTransHint: Pick the source language below, save first, then translate. Saved directly, re-runnable.
show.staleWarn: ⚠ Source content changed — translations may be stale. Re-run AI translate.
show.variantHint: The public “spec selector” only appears when this product shares a series with others.
show.luminaireHint: Pick a standard type. AI uses it for more accurate box contents and install.
show.description: Product description (paragraph under the public H1)
show.highlightsEmpty: No highlights yet. Add 3–4, e.g. “Waterproof IP65”, “5-year warranty”.
show.appsEmpty: No scenes yet. Add 3–6, e.g. “Retail”, “Outdoor”, “Industrial”, with photos.
show.heading: Heading
show.blocksEmpty: No detail yet. Alternate heading / paragraph / image to build a long page.
show.boxEmpty: Empty. e.g. Fixture ×1, accessories ×1, manual ×1, warranty card ×1.
show.dimHintSrc: Used for the dimension diagram; empty falls back to the spec table
show.dimHintTr: Values are source-only; only the cutout note is translated here
show.installPh: Install method in one line, e.g. recessed + spring clips
show.faqEmpty: No Q&A yet. End-customer, usage-oriented: how to install, choosing CCT, outdoor use, warranty, what's in the box.

figures.label: Figures
figures.captionSingle: Photography is illustrative; final finishes vary by spec.
figures.captionMulti: Tap a thumbnail to switch the main view.

box.label: In the Box
box.note: Package contents are indicative; actual packaging prevails.
